mapper.insert: INSERT INTO games (room_id, black_user_id, white_user_id, total_steps, outcome, runaway_user_id, black_elo_before, white_elo_before, black_elo_after, white_elo_after, black_elo_delta, white_elo_delta) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{whiteUserId}, #{totalSteps}, #{outcome}, #{runawayUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{blackEloBefore}, #{whiteEloBefore}, #{blackEloAfter}, #{whiteEloAfter}, #{blackEloDelta}, #{whiteEloDelta})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM games WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
